content.content:
apiVersion: v1
data:
  mongod.conf: |
    storage:
      dbPath: /data/db
      wiredTiger:
        engineConfig:
          journalCompressor: zlib
    net:
      bindIpAll: true
    replication:
      replSetName: mongodb-replica
    security:
      authorization: enabled
      keyFile: /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
    systemLog:
      verbosity: 1
    operationProfiling:
      mode: slowOp
      slowOpThresholdMs: 200
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"mongod.conf":"storage:\n  dbPath: /data/db\n  wiredTiger:\n    engineConfig:\n      journalCompressor: zlib\nnet:\n  bindIpAll: true\nreplication:\n  replSetName: mongodb-replica\nsecurity:\n  authorization: enabled\n  keyFile: /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile\nsystemLog:\n  verbosity: 1\noperationProfiling:\n  mode: slowOp\n  slowOpThresholdMs: 200\n"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongod-config","namespace":"mongodb"}}

input.description: Get StatefulSet yaml to find init containers and user setup

content.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongodb-replica","namespace":"mongodb"},"spec":{"podManagementPolicy":"Parallel","replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"serviceName":"mongodb-replica-svc","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["mongod","--config","/etc/mongo-config/mongod.conf"],"env":[{"name":"ADMIN_PASSWORD","valueFrom":{"secretKeyRef":{"key":"password","name":"admin-user-password"}}}],"image":"mongo:6.0.5","livenessProbe":{"exec":{"command":["/bin/sh","-c","mongosh --quiet \"mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval \"db.adminCommand({ping:1})\""]},"failureThreshold":10,"initialDelaySeconds":60,"periodSeconds":15,"timeoutSeconds":5},"name":"mongod","ports":[{"containerPort":27017,"name":"mongodb","protocol":"TCP"}],"readinessProbe":{"exec":{"command":["/bin/sh","-c","mongosh --quiet \"mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval \"db.adminCommand({ping:1})\""]},"failureThreshold":6,"initialDelaySeconds":30,"periodSeconds":10,"timeoutSeconds":5},"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"1","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"0.5","memory":"512Mi"}},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/data/db","name":"data-volume"},{"mountPath":"/etc/mongo-keyfile","name":"mongo-keyfile","readOnly":true},{"mountPath":"/etc/mongo-config/mongod.conf","name":"mongod-config","readOnly":true,"subPath":"mongod.conf"}]}],"securityContext":{"runAsGroup":0,"runAsUser":0},"volumes":[{"name":"mongo-keyfile","secret":{"defaultMode":256,"secretName":"mongo-keyfile"}},{"configMap":{"items":[{"key":"mongod.conf","path":"mongod.conf"}],"name":"mongod-config"},"name":"mongod-config"}]}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"data-volume"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"10Gi"}}}}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-24T05:31:34Z"
  generation: 1
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
  resourceVersion: "998639"
  uid: ce1faf92-9851-4c16-8ae1-c54b472ada0d
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - mongod
        - --config
        - /etc/mongo-config/mongod.conf
        env:
        - name: ADMIN_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: password
              name: admin-user-password
        image: mongo:6.0.5
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - mongosh --quiet "mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin"
              --eval "db.adminCommand({ping:1})"
          failureThreshold: 10
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 15
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        name: mongod
        ports:
        - containerPort: 27017
          name: mongodb
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - mongosh --quiet "mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin"
              --eval "db.adminCommand({ping:1})"
          failureThreshold: 6
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /data/db
          name: data-volume
        - mountPath: /etc/mongo-keyfile
          name: mongo-keyfile
          readOnly: true
        - mountPath: /etc/mongo-config/mongod.conf
          name: mongod-config
          readOnly: true
          subPath: mongod.conf
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext:
        runAsGroup: 0
        runAsUser: 0
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - name: mongo-keyfile
        secret:

input.content:
MongoDB Replica Set Compliance Audit
Audit Date: 2026-06-24
Namespace: mongodb
Auditor: Read-only inspection (no cluster mutations made)

=======================================================================
1. REPLICA SET OVERVIEW
=======================================================================
Replica Set Name : mongodb-replica
Protocol Version : 1
Total Members    : 3
Majority Vote Count : 2 (write majority count: 2)

Member Roles:
  - mongodb-replica-0 (PRIMARY)  : _id=0, priority=1, votes=1, arbiterOnly=false
  - mongodb-replica-1 (SECONDARY): _id=1, priority=1, votes=1, arbiterOnly=false
  - mongodb-replica-2 (SECONDARY): _id=2, priority=1, votes=1, arbiterOnly=false

All members healthy (health=1), no hidden or delayed members.
writeConcernMajorityJournalDefault: true

=======================================================================
2. AUTHENTICATION SETTINGS
=======================================================================
Authorization          : enabled  (mongod.conf: security.authorization = enabled)
Keyfile auth (intra-RS): enabled  (security.keyFile = /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile)
Authentication Mechanisms (runtime): MONGODB-X509, SCRAM-SHA-1, SCRAM-SHA-256

=======================================================================
3. USERS AND ROLES
=======================================================================
Admin database users (admin.system.users):

  User     : admin-user
  Database : admin
  Auth mechanisms: SCRAM-SHA-1 (iter=10000), SCRAM-SHA-256 (iter=15000)
  Roles:
    - readWriteAnyDatabase  @ admin
    - clusterAdmin          @ admin
    - userAdminAnyDatabase  @ admin

No other users found in admin.system.users.

=======================================================================
4. JOURNAL COMPRESSOR
=======================================================================
Engine              : WiredTiger
Journal Compressor  : zlib
  (storage.wiredTiger.engineConfig.journalCompressor = zlib in mongod.conf)

=======================================================================
5. LOG VERBOSITY
=======================================================================
systemLog.verbosity (config) : 1
logLevel (runtime, confirmed): 1
  (Default is 0; value of 1 = raised verbosity / debug level 1)

=======================================================================
6. SLOW-OPERATION THRESHOLD (Operation Profiling)
=======================================================================
operationProfiling.mode               : slowOp
operationProfiling.slowOpThresholdMs  : 200 ms
  (Default MongoDB threshold is 100 ms; this is set to 200 ms — tightened
   relative to the default in the direction of logging fewer slow ops,
   or per deployment policy, raised above default)

Runtime confirmation (getCmdLineOpts):
  operationProfiling: { mode: 'slowOp', slowOpThresholdMs: 200 }

=======================================================================
7. NETWORK BINDING
=======================================================================
net.bindIpAll : true  (binds to all interfaces, 0.0.0.0)

=======================================================================
8. STORAGE
=======================================================================
storage.dbPath : /data/db
Storage Engine : WiredTiger

=======================================================================
9. CONTAINER / WORKLOAD DETAILS
=======================================================================
Kubernetes StatefulSet : mongodb-replica (replicas: 3)
Pod image              : mongo:6.0.5
Service                : mongodb-replica-svc (ClusterIP, headless, port 27017)
Persistent volumes     : data-volume per pod (ReadWriteOnce, 10Gi each)
Pod security context   : runAsUser=0, runAsGroup=0

=======================================================================
10. AUDIT SUMMARY
=======================================================================
Finding                        Value              Notes
---------------------------------------------------------------------
Replica count                  3                  1 PRIMARY + 2 SECONDARY
Authentication                 ENABLED            SCRAM-SHA-1 + SCRAM-SHA-256
Keyfile (intra-cluster auth)   ENABLED            /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
Admin user                     admin-user         3 privileged roles (see §3)
Journal compressor             zlib               Non-default (default: snappy)
Log verbosity                  1                  Raised from default 0
Slow-op threshold              200 ms             Changed from default 100 ms
Profiling mode                 slowOp             Logs operations > 200 ms
Network binding                0.0.0.0 (all IPs)  bindIpAll: true
---------------------------------------------------------------------

No configuration mutations were made during this audit.
All findings are read-only observations of the live cluster state.
